title: Chagall Museum in Nice | Mas du Chanoine
description: Chagall Museum in Nice: French Riviera event near our guesthouse.
paragraphs: Built during the life of Chagall and under his supervision, the museum houses the largest collection of works by the artist who lived in Vence and Saint Paul de Vence the last 35 years of his life.
Some works are only visible in Nice (painted harpsichord, museum auditorium with stained glass created by Chagall himself and works on king David).
